input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8717 [Automation] java run fails for org.sangria-graphql:sangria-marshalling-api_3:1.1.0-RC3; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The RC3 artifact changed FromInput.seqInput to return SeqFromInput instead of IterableFromInput, so existing tests with overly specific RC1 type annotations may fail to compile; this is an API adaptation issue, not an external setup requirement.

Scala tests still need the repository's normal Scala 3 test scaffold/compiler handling, but no additional Maven dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required by this library.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is needed: sangria-marshalling-api_3 is a pure Scala marshalling abstraction with only scala3-library as a runtime dependency, and meaningful coverage can be reached with in-memory marshalling/unmarshalling tests.
